titleZh: 中国公司法广泛改革对企业的影响
titleEn: Broad Reforms to China’s Company Law Will Affect Most PRC Companies
authors: Skadden, Arps, Slate, Meagher & Flom LLP
abstractZh: 对资本规则、治理灵活性和高管义务的实务影响梳理清楚，适合和法规页互相跳转。
abstractEn: A concise practitioner map of capital, governance, and management-duty reforms with strong cross-reference value.
